# Audio asset provenance

The repository owner confirmed on July 21, 2026 that the music and sound-effect
files in this directory were obtained from a source that offered them free for
any use, including redistribution, and approved their inclusion in this public
project.

The original source URLs and per-file license labels were not retained. This
notice records the owner's clearance; it does not assign a more specific license
or authorship claim than the available provenance supports.

The files are catalogued by path and SHA-256 digest in `catalog.json` so their
identity can be verified.
